goal: Validates context_packet scope: present on executor shapes, absent on review-only shapes.

input.task_definition: Implement the context packet contract per Phase 3 scope.

context_packet.summary: Gem Team adoption analysis complete. High-value: context packet, skill promotion, pre-wave cache.
key_findings: context_packet is optional, executor shapes only

expected.backwards_compat: Legacy dispatch without context_packet remains valid per schema optionality.
expected.review_only_shapes_excluded: PlanAuditor, AssumptionVerifier, ExecutabilityVerifier, CodeReviewer do NOT receive context_packet.
